name: Маска Кирки
notes: The Pick's Mask of the Defense of the First Adit, Kragmir's staged founding legend. The role of the hero who answered the breach with a miner's greatpick; the current bearer is an orc arena professional, and by tradition her name is never announced. The counter-attacker of the Five: she charges off the platform to punish overextended raiders, her fatal pick turns crits into showstoppers, and orc ferocity keeps her standing through a killing blow. The most baitable of the Five: she breaks script first.

strikes.name: greatpick
strikes.text: On a critical hit, the pick punches through armor: the target also takes @Damage[1d8[persistent,bleed]] damage.

actions.name: Sudden Charge
actions.text: Маска Кирки Strides twice. If she ends her movement within melee reach of at least one enemy, she can make a melee Strike against that enemy.
